events.appearance_notes: High activity; A white car with double flashes slowly appeared on the screen, crushing the black dog walking in the middle of the road.
events.event_text: From 1.2s to 8.2s, a white car with double flashes slowly appeared on the screen, crushing the black dog walking in the middle of the road.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The white car was driving in the middle of the road, and several dogs ran onto the road.
events.event_text: From 8.4s to 25.3s, the white car was driving in the middle of the road, and several dogs ran onto the road.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; There was a black dog left on the road. It walked to the middle of the road next to the dog that had just been crushed.
events.event_text: From 25.3s to 48.5s, there was a black dog left on the road. It walked to the middle of the road next to the dog that had just been crushed.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The black dog walked away and left the middle of the road.
events.event_text: From 48.5s to 59.1s, the black dog walked away and left the middle of the road.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The gray dog pulled out the tail of the dog that had just been run over by the car, then stayed for a few minutes and left.
events.event_text: From 40.4s to 47.6s, the gray dog pulled out the tail of the dog that had just been run over by the car, then stayed for a few minutes and left.
